_comment: Project-level hooks: hindsight (semantic memory) + think (deep reasoning) + codegraph (code structure). DCP plugin runs automatically.

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[hindsight] Semantic memory available: hindsight_recall (search history), hindsight_retain (save findings). bank_id auto-managed."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[think] Deep reasoning available: use think tool for complex analysis, multi-step planning, or when stuck on hard problems."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[codegraph] Code structure available: codegraph_search (find symbols), codegraph_context (understand dependencies), codegraph_impact (analyze change radius)."}}'
